creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Olivier Cochard from comment #6)

Can probably put this under local distfiles and just manually track/update it.

It should show up under LOCAL/zi/ as enterprise-numbers-20240907.txt once syncing completes.

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/slow-porting/

We can use this instead of creating a new port.
